_note: Per-slug launch registry. The watchdog reads this to know how to revive a stale agent. Edit by hand — operator-curated. Each entry under 'agents' maps slug → {kind, command, args, cwd, env}. 'kind' = 'process' (default) | 'docker'. For docker, set kind='docker' + container + image + optional docker_args.

sanctum._note: Master orchestration agent. The .bat launcher is the canonical entry. Defaults to auto_revive=false because the .bat opens an interactive bash+Claude window the operator should be present for. Flip to true if you want unattended auto-relaunch.

sinister-forge._note: Forge UI — Textual-based orchestration pane. Disabled by default to avoid popping a window. Operator can flip 'auto_revive' to true when desired.

sinister-vault._note: Vault daemon on :5078. The install script lives at tools/sinister-vault/.

rkoj._note: RKOJ.exe workbench. The built EXE lives at automations/window-manager/dist/RKOJ.exe.

services._note_services: Optional docker-backed services. Each entry: kind='docker', container=<name>, image=<image>, docker_args=[...]. Example below disabled until operator opts in.

stale_minutes_override._note: Per-slug overrides for the global stale threshold. Some agents naturally heartbeat less often.
